chapter_title.ar: بَابُ الْإِشَارَةِ وَ النَّصِّ عَلَى أَبِي الْحَسَنِ الرِّضَا ( عليه السلام )
chapter_title.en: Chapter 72 – The Indication and the wordings upon Abu Al-Hassan Al-Reza<sup>asws</sup>

gradings: Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/345)
Allamah Baqir al-Majlisi: موثق - Mir‘at al ‘Uqul Fi Sharh Akhbar Al al Rasul (3/345)
text: خَرَجَ إِلَيْنَا مِنْ أَبِي الْحَسَنِ ( عليه السلام ) بِالْبَصْرَةِ أَلْوَاحٌ مَكْتُوبٌ فِيهَا بِالْعَرْضِ عَهْدِي إِلَى أَكْبَرِ وُلْدِي يُعْطَى فُلَانٌ كَذَا وَ فُلَانٌ كَذَا وَ فُلَانٌ كَذَا وَ فُلَانٌ لَا يُعْطَى حَتَّى أَجِي‏ءَ أَوْ يَقْضِيَ اللَّهُ عَزَّ وَ جَلَّ عَلَيَّ الْمَوْتَ إِنَّ اللَّهَ يَفْعَلُ مَا يَشَاءُ .

en.hubeali: A number of our companions, from Ahmad Bin Muhammad, from Ali Bin Al Hakam, from Abdullah Bin Al Mugheira, from Al Husayn Bin Al Mukhtar who said,

‘The tablets (written parchments) came out to us from Abu Al-Hassan<sup>asws</sup> at Al-Basra wherein it was written width-wise: ‘My<sup>asws</sup> Covenant is to my<sup>asws</sup> eldest son<sup>asws</sup> that he<sup>asws</sup> should give to so and so, such, and to so and so, such, and to so and so he<sup>asws</sup> should not give until I<sup>asws</sup> come or Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Mighty and Majestic Ordains the death upon me<sup>asws</sup>. Surely, Allah<sup>azwj</sup> Does whatever He<sup>azwj</sup> so Desires to’.
en.sarwar: 9. A number of our people has narrated from Ahmad ibn Muhammad from Ali ibn al-Hakam from ‘Abdallah ibn al-Mughirah from al-Husayn ibn al-Mukhtar who has said the following. “In Basra (wherein the Imam (a.s.) was imprisoned) certain tablets came out to us from abu al-Hassan (a.s.) on which, it was written horizontally, ‘My instructions and directives to the my eldest son (Ali ibn Musa al-Rida (a.s.) who should give such and such to so and so. As far so and so is concerned do not give him anything until I will come or Allah, the Most Holy, the Most High, will decree that I must die, Allah certainly does what He wills.”
